---
name: Compiler bug report
about: Report a bug that can affects the project compilation
title: ''

assignees: ''

---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Errors and Warnings

Include the entire error message except for confidential information.
Include all relevant warnings.
If the error message includes a reference to a file containing exception details, include this file.

## Code to Reproduce

Include a stripped down version of the code required to reproduce the issue.

If it happens with a custom aspect, include the aspect.

## Versions

 - Metalama: 
 - .NET SDK:
 - Target Framework:
 - OS:
- Processor Architecture : AMD64 / ARM64.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
